title: Limited complexity of SPARQL queries with Virtuoso
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'Test%';
key_bug_features: SPARQL query exceeds 10000 lines of generated SQL
